hero.subtitle: Professional solutions in refrigeration, air conditioning, solar energy, and spare parts for your home appliances in Al Hoceima and across Morocco.

items.title: Refrigeration
items.desc: Installation, maintenance, and repair of residential and industrial refrigeration systems.
items.fullDesc: Our team of certified technicians handles installation, preventive maintenance, and repair of all types of refrigeration systems: household refrigerators, commercial cold rooms, refrigerated display cases, industrial freezers.

items.title: Air Conditioning
items.desc: Installation and maintenance of split, centralized, and commercial AC units of all brands.
items.fullDesc: AC specialists, we install and maintain residential split systems, commercial multi-zone units, and VRF systems for large spaces. Authorized distributor for AUX, Daikin, Carrier, LG and more.

items.title: Solar Energy
items.desc: Solar water heaters and solar energy systems to reduce your energy costs.
items.fullDesc: Reduce your energy bill by up to 70% with our thermal solar water heaters and hybrid systems. Professional installation throughout the Rif region, with manufacturer warranty and follow-up.
includes: Installation on flat or sloped roof

items.title: Spare Parts
items.desc: Wide range of genuine spare parts for Whirlpool, Samsung, Ariston, Bosch, and more.
items.fullDesc: Authorized distribution center for original spare parts. We maintain a permanent stock of compressors, thermostats, motors, electronic boards, and consumables for all major home appliance and HVAC brands.

items.title: Centralized HVAC
items.desc: Custom solutions for large spaces: hotels, offices, warehouses, and shopping centers.
items.fullDesc: For large-scale projects, our team of engineers designs and installs VRF/VRV centralized HVAC systems, chillers, and air handling units suited for hotels, commercial complexes, educational and industrial establishments.

items.title: After-Sales Service
items.desc: Authorized service center with maintenance contracts for the world's leading brands.
items.fullDesc: As an authorized after-sales service center for Whirlpool, Samsung, Ariston, and Bosch, we perform under-warranty and post-warranty repairs with original parts. Preventive maintenance contracts available for individuals and businesses.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for over 10 years

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Vereen Electro Froid is a company specialized in the sale, installation, and maintenance of air conditioning, refrigeration, solar energy systems, and home appliances. Based in Al Hoceima at the heart of the Rif region, our company has established itself as the reference partner for professionals and individuals throughout the northern Morocco region.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: Provide professional-quality thermal comfort solutions at competitive prices, through our technical expertise and privileged partnerships with the world's leading brands.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To become the leading independent national HVAC and appliance after-sales service provider in Morocco, expanding our service network to all major Moroccan cities.

certifications.title: Our Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Authorized service center for leading brands

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Certified technicians at your service
team.content: Our team consists of qualified technicians, trained directly by manufacturer partners. Each team member undergoes regular training to stay current with the latest technologies and best industry practices.

coverage.title: Service Area
coverage.subtitle: Al Hoceima and all of northern Morocco
coverage.content: We primarily serve the Tanger-Tétouan-Al Hoceima region, with ongoing expansion to major Moroccan cities: Casablanca, Rabat, Fès, Marrakech and Agadir.
